recentTweets.text: RT @USProgressives: New Idea To Make Groceries Cheaper, Help Farmers. @RepCasar @RepMcGovern https://t.co/JrUiL8mMll
RT @USProgressives: "Over 100 house Democrats voted to block billions of dollars in weapons to Netanyahu." @RepCasar @Ilhan @repdeliaramire…
Donald Trump is off the deep end.

Trump gets power.

His buddies get new private jets.

15 million Americans lose health care.

Here’s how Trump’s Washington works.

Trump makes AI investor David Sacks his ‘AI Czar.’

Sacks blocks regulation on AI.

Sacks spends millions to help Republicans win elections.

Corruption. And you’re paying for it.

RT @RepMcGovern: For too long, DC has let Big Ag billionaires call the shots while farmers & families got screwed.

My new bill with @repca…

This should be illegal.

@ChrisMurphyCT and I have a bill to ban prediction markets where some people know or control the outcomes.

I just voted to end US funding for Israel’s weapons of war.

More Democrats than ever before voted to block funding. That is a victory for the millions of Americans who have demanded an end to our taxpayer dollars going to fund genocide.

Tomorrow we get back to work. We will
RT @RepMcGovern: NEWS: I’m leading a statement with 25 colleagues who are voting YES on @RepThomasMassie's amendment. For decades, U.S. tax…

Housing costs are crushing working people.

That's why I supported the bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act.

It cracks down on private equity buying up single-family homes, rewards cities that build, and cuts red tape.

It just became law — despite Trump refusing to sign it.

Tomorrow, the House will vote on an amendment to block the $3.3 billion in taxpayer funding we send to Israel's military.

I will vote yes.

It is past time for us to end aid used to commit genocide in Gaza, kill innocents in Lebanon and beyond, and help drag us into war with https://t.co/pEPfAyCO0E

RT @RepChuyGarcia: The people of Venezuela deserve a full humanitarian response after the devastating June 24 earthquakes.

Today, @RepCasa…

I'm calling on @JohnCornyn to meet with Epstein survivors opposing Todd Blanche's nomination.

Blanche led the Epstein files coverup. Now Trump wants to make him AG.

Epstein survivors have asked to meet personally with Cornyn to share their concerns, but so far he's refused.
🔴 LIVE: Congressmen Casar, McGovern Hold Press Conference on Food Affordability https://t.co/T5DM0RXXud
ICE has killed another person on the streets of an American city. https://t.co/NkX0a5a5BK

Unacceptable.

I’m grateful to Rep. Khanna for speaking out and calling attention to the deplorable conditions in the West Bank. I’m glad he is safe.

America must stop funding this insanity.

With $1.5 trillion, we can have 20 years of universal child care in our country.

Instead, Republicans in Congress want $1.5 trillion for illegal wars. https://t.co/2xnkd2IzpM
Kids are going hungry so billionaires can get a tax break. https://t.co/VqxucqzVwn

ICE shot and killed Lorenzo Araujo yesterday.

ICE says he drove his car at them. But that's what ICE said about Renee Good, which was a lie. That's what they said after killling Ruben Ray Martinez, and that was a lie.

We need an independent investigation and accountability.

Trump is extending his disastrous, illegal war with Iran. 

Congress and the American people have demanded the war end. Instead, Trump is choosing higher gas prices, more lives lost, and more instability.

Outrageous.

Trump used over $1,000,000 of your taxpayer money to "fix" the National Mall’s reflecting pool.

A Trump donor was given the contract without even needing to bid.

Remember this the next time he says there's no money for your health care. https://t.co/gotolE564u

New reporting shows people are paying $2 million a head for a pardon in Trump’s Washington.

Corruption, plain and simple. https://t.co/Rvb5OtW6EG

A new @Public_Citizen report shows corporations have already spent over $517 million to influence this year’s elections.

That’s more than they spent in 2018, 2020, and 2022 COMBINED.

We have to overturn Citizens United, ban super PACs, & get big money out of politics for good. https://t.co/lqWF4a7DCr
Here's how companies get tax breaks when they replace workers with AI. https://t.co/jb6BU1x3GA

In February, Trump quietly bought up to $5 million in Dell stock.

Days later, he told Americans to buy Dell computers.

Last month, the Pentagon gave Dell a $9.7B contract.

Today, Trump is again promoting Dell computers — with Dell’s stock surging right after.

Corruption.

The Trump family has made over $5 BILLION in corrupt crypto deals.

Now Trump is openly bragging that his government won’t investigate cryptocurrency-related crimes.

Corruption, plain and simple.
Here's what you need to know about Trump’s new Air Force One. https://t.co/voamdDjz8y

Is Donald Trump about to trigger a refugee crisis right by our border?
He already has a near-total fuel blockade against Cuba, which he wants to take over "almost immediately."
Last time he sanctioned Cuba, 10% of the population fled. We shouldn't push people out of their homes. https://t.co/rNST8sowYP
Read more about our plan here —> https://t.co/nTAlYLp7JQ

This is what Trump says about my resolution with @RepYvetteClarke, @RepEspaillat, and @RepGraceMeng to restore voting rights, end the filibuster, and reform the Supreme Court.

At least he admits it: the Supreme Court’s attacks on voting rights are about rigging elections for Rs. https://t.co/GgQzhlwo4Q

Vice President JD Vance says don't worry, AI won't take your job.
Easy to say when your party's taking millions from the big AI companies.
I'm not buying it. Let's tax AI and keep Americans at work. https://t.co/73ltiD8nMA

For 250 years, the Declaration of Independence has inspired generations to believe in a country that can continue to improve itself.

Happy birthday, America. https://t.co/y3Pmd8yB5G

RFK Jr. looked me dead in the eye and lied. He said, "there are no cuts to Medicaid."

Now we have receipts: 3.8 million people lost Medicaid or CHIP.

All to pay for tax cuts for billionaire donors. https://t.co/e6yUm8Djvs

Abbott Labs gave $500K to Trump's inauguration.

Now the criminal investigation into whether their formula sickened and killed babies has been shut down. https://t.co/pe1RGQRblX
Supreme Court corruption news. https://t.co/qszbOlwckM
Trump just raised student loan costs for millions. https://t.co/8IP0LpEPyQ
RT @RepMcClellan: My next episode of Moments with McClellan stars @USProgressives Chair, fellow UVA alum and a champion for working people…

In America, no president — no wannabe king — gets to pick and choose who is and is not an American.

That is what Donald Trump is attacking when he goes after birthright citizenship.

We will not go back. https://t.co/nnhPNZhaRY

We just got Trump’s financial disclosures.

Trump made $2.2 billion in his first year as president.

While costs are going up for you, he’s cashing in. https://t.co/MG3c7DmQwS

While we won the birthright citizenship case today, we also got a grave warning about the future.

Four far-right Supreme Court justices ruled against a right that is clearly written in the Constitution.

None of our rights are safe. We must reign in this hyper-partisan Court. https://t.co/ZfsjtG74uM
The Supreme Court just released an opinion we will come to know as Citizens United 2.0. https://t.co/Tzb5LR5KdT
Lynn Callaway is sharing the latest horrifying story about how Texas' abortion ban is hurting women. https://t.co/ELLqV3uovM

Oracle has laid off 21,000 employees citing AI.

AI billionaires want to replace millions of workers. We need a plan to keep Americans employed. https://t.co/bVuUTZ6p1s

Soon, the House will vote on an amendment to block taxpayer funding to Israel’s military.

I will vote yes.

The Israeli government committed war crimes in Gaza and helped drag America into war with Iran. Americans should not be financing more weapons for Netanyahu.

I am aware

A tech giant just admitted — in writing, to the federal government — that they’re laying off thousands of workers because of AI.

It’s why Congress needs to pass my proposal to tax AI and keep people employed. https://t.co/62pYidvaeC

For the first time in over 50 years, Congress ordered a sitting president to end a war.

Trump’s war in Iran is illegal and disastrous. https://t.co/PrdAOYHrdM

No delays and no excuses.

Next time Democrats have power, we must restore voting rights, abolish the filibuster, and reform the Supreme Court. https://t.co/GSSJ6ggzRL
Trump just told the Speaker of the House "no one gives a shit about housing." https://t.co/MPE0ICg98p

On this one, I’m with Joe.

Any disruption to Big Bend for Trump’s border wall is B.S.

Trump promised to Make America Healthy Again. 

Instead, his administration convinced the Supreme Court to give immunity to corporations whose pesticides can cause cancer.

Yet again, Trump sells out working people to corporate interests.

Awful.

Trump's far-right Supreme Court majority is green lighting his lawless attacks on immigrants trying to follow the law.

Terrible for rule of law and for families just trying to get by.
We must reform the most unethical, partisan Supreme Court in modern American history. https://t.co/Rkxhwt9ZhY

Restore voting rights.

End the filibuster.

Reform the Supreme Court.

Over and over Republicans said they would not kick Americans off health care.

They lied.

New data shows 5 million people have already lost insurance.
https://t.co/dueQeuvmXB

Donald Trump cares about rigging elections for himself, not bringing down prices for you.

Example number 5,000 ⬇️
RT @FWDus: Thank you, @RepCasar, for your advocacy for #DACA and Dreamers!

This is a big deal.

For the first time since 1973, both the House and the Senate have approved this kind of resolution directing the president to end a war.

Republicans and Democrats in both the House and the Senate voted for this.

Trump must end his illegal, disastrous war.

This month marks the 14th anniversary of DACA.

Under Trump, nearly 270 Dreamers have been detained and at least 85 deported.

When I met with Dreamers in Austin, I promised to keep fighting for permanent protections and a real pathway to citizenship. https://t.co/1pzk1UJaEm

Texas' abortion ban is risking lives.

An Austin woman was bleeding from her miscarriage, but healthcare providers didn’t remove dead fetal tissue from her body.

A few weeks later, she bled until her clothes were soaked. She eventually got the care she needed — outside of TX.

A few weeks later, she bled until her clothes were soaked. She eventually got the care she needed — outside of TX.

AI companies give Trump’s Republican Party millions of dollars, then Republicans block all AI regulations and downplay the risks.

We need to tax AI to pay for a jobs program to keep Americans employed.

Republicans in Congress kicked 15 million Americans off health care because we ‘can’t afford it.’

Meanwhile:

While working people struggle to afford groceries, Trump is bragging about his $400 million new ‘palace in the sky.’

It’s a gift from a foreign government – and American taxpayers are on the hook for security upgrades.

Outrageous.

We just brought nearly $1M to Palm Park, once the heart and soul of Austin’s Mexican-American community.

Trees, a splash pad, places for kids to play. This is what our public dollars should go to: beautiful, free public spaces.

An example of government doing something good. https://t.co/Tbjuj1KH4W

RT @RepJayapal: Excited to share that @RepCasar and I have officially introduced a bill to guarantee DOUBLE overtime pay!

Workers deserve…

Inflation is at a 3-year high.

15 million Americans are losing their health care.

Donald Trump is focused on building a ballroom and getting more money for ICE.

Elon Musk talks about “waste fraud and abuse” when he wants to kick seniors off Social Security.

But experts say “almost all” of his wealth comes from government help.
https://t.co/OhbY7zWymR

KUT is an Austin institution. And Debbie Hiott is an Austin hero for speaking out, no matter the consequences.

The White House, and now UT, are trying to crack down on those they think are disobedient.

America was built by those who refused to simply obey those in power. I

This is a huge scandal.

They cut your health care while spending taxpayer dollars on a golden ballroom for Donald Trump.

And they lied about it.
Why should any of us care that Donald Trump is hosting a UFC fight on the White House lawn? https://t.co/Jan61Z5rSL

Luis Fernando is free and just got to walk the graduation stage. 

Donald Trump wants to make you feel like it’s impossible to make change. When people speak up, it makes a difference. https://t.co/8QF7H367Gl
With every discharge petition, we send a message: the Speaker may hold the gavel, but in the United States of America working people are still in charge. https://t.co/aXQxpQYuus

Americans marched and bled and died for the right to form a union. 

This week the House passed the Faster Labor Contracts Act — one step towards making that right real for all workers. https://t.co/DgonJ8L9Dv

Surveillance pricing should be illegal.

I have a bill to ban it.
The day after threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare, Republicans are sending billions to Trump’s mass deportation machine – which still has $100 billion sitting in the bank.
In the final months of their House majority, House Republicans are doubling down on their failed approach: blank checks for ICE and not one cent to make things cheaper for working families.
https://t.co/sQMl2J5YTa

New data shows billionaires have tripled their net worth in the past 15 years.

From $4.5 trillion to $14.2 trillion.

Is your life 3 times better than it was 15 years ago? https://t.co/F91Med1tYG

I just introduced a bill to make overtime pay more for the first time in nearly 90 years.

If you work more than 40 hours a week, you should get paid double for the extra time.

I’m working with @RepJayapal and @RepHorsford to get it done. https://t.co/Zo0ACnKacP

Absolutely not. 

AI spends millions to help Republicans in elections.

In return, Republicans stop states from protecting you from AI. 

It’s corruption – and it’s dangerous.

https://t.co/oqwf67Vfow

$2 trillion+ for billionaire tax cuts. 

A $70 billion blank check for ICE and CBP.

$1.8 billion for J6 rioters.

Now they say we need to cut Medicare and Social Security.

https://t.co/lJvflUmwu9

When billionaire owners move teams to make a buck, that’s what fans face.

What would you do with an extra $750? 

That’s what Trump’s war in Iran has cost every American. https://t.co/cHulpM07tH

Corruption. 

Here are the facts —> https://t.co/36aXzR5pCE
This guy might be the most dangerous Trump crony you haven’t heard of. https://t.co/Qom9NiCwxa

It's why the Bears may leave Chicago.

It's also why @SenSanders and I introduced the Home Team Act — requiring team owners to offer locals the chance to buy a team before moving it away.

BREAKING: The House just passed a War Powers Resolution to end Trump's illegal war.

Both houses of Congress have now passed bipartisan resolutions demanding the war end.

The Constitution gives Congress, not the president, power to declare war.

Trump must end this war now.

I brought AOC tortillas from H-E-B.

They make people feel better after a tough night, and that's what the Spurs are going to give Knicks fans tonight.

You’re talking to some senators.

“If a company doesn’t want to do surveil…

Trump is putting his personal henchman in charge National Intelligence. 

This isn't about keeping Americans safe -- it's about weaponizing intelligence against Trump's enemies.

No Dem should vote to extend FISA 702 without a real, iron-clad warrant requirement.
RT @USProgressives: 40 Progressive Caucus Members are urging @Apple to reverse the announced closure of a unionized Apple Store in Towson,…
Every time House Republicans vote against War Powers Resolutions, this is what they are voting for.

What is happening at Delaney Hall is a national scandal.

We need immediate medical care for detainees, direct unrestricted oversight, and humanitarian release of the most vulnerable.

And we must shut down Delaney and for-profit detention centers.

We just learned Anthropic will file for a $1 trillion IPO.

The path we are on is: AI makes a small number of people very rich, but millions lose work.

That must change.

Tax AI. Use the money to create jobs so unemployment doesn’t rise.
One step closer.
